zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Heaton II於1288年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德林加姆時，他的父親Thomas de Heaton29歲，母親Joan NEVILLE31歲。他於1313年與Agnes de Heaton在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1353年1月30日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Heaton II于1288年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德林加姆时，他的父亲Thomas de Heaton29岁，母亲Joan NEVILLE31岁。他于1313年与Agnes de Heaton在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1353年1月30日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hēah ‘high’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’: Heaton (Yorkshire, Northumberland); Heaton Norris, Heaton under Horwich, Heaton with Oxcliffe, Great Heaton, Little Heaton (all Lancashire); Capheaton, Kirkheaton (Northumberland); Cleckheaton, Hanging Heaton, Kirkheaton (Yorkshire). This surname was taken to Ireland in the mid 17th century, and within Ireland is now mainly found in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Heaton II was born in 1288, in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Heaton, was 29 and his mother, Joan NEVILLE, was 31. He married Agnes de Heaton in 1313, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 January 1353, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Northumberland, England.

fr.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Heaton II est né en 1288, à Chillingham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Heaton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan NEVILLE, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Heaton en 1313, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1353, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Heaton II 1288 in Chillingham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Heaton 29 und seine Mutter Joan NEVILLE 31. Er hat 1313 in Northumberland, England Agnes de Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Januar 1353 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Northumberland, England begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes de Heaton nel 1313, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 gennaio 1353, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Heaton IIが1288年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドチリンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Heatonは29歳，母Joan NEVILLEは31歳であった。1313年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでAgnes de Heatonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1353年1月30日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Heaton II(이)가 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 치링함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Heaton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan NEVILLE(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1313년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Agnes de Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1353년 1월 30일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Heaton II nasceu em 1288, em Chillingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Heaton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan NEVILLE, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Heaton em 1313, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1353, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Heaton II родился в 1288 г. в местности чиллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Heaton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan NEVILLE, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Heaton в 1313 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 января 1353 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности нортумбирланд, Англия.
